title: tetragonolobus siliquosus var. maritimus
intro: Tetragonolobus siliquosus var. maritimus, also known as the sea bean, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is native to the coastal regions of Western Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of the sea bean include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Tetragonolobus siliquosus var. maritimus typically involve drying the plant's leaves and roots, then infusing them in hot water to make a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
